title: Mike Curry
compiled_truth: Mike Curry is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-07-20 to 2002-02-21), Mike Curry sent 59 and received 392 emails, totalling 451 interactions. Top correspondents: [Doug Gilbert-Smith](people/doug-gilbert-smith) (35), [Clint Dean](people/clint-dean) (21), [David Portz](people/david-portz) (20), [Bruce Sukaly](people/bruce-sukaly) (13), [Lance Cunningham](people/lance-cunningham) (12). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, cya, deleted_items, emailaddresses, ercot, inbox.
